<objective>
Orchestrator composing 4 documentation skills into a sequential pipeline with convergence-based remediation and qualitative health reporting

Phases:

- freshen: Check graph freshness, detect AGENTS.md, trigger bootstrap if needed
- detect: Invoke detect-doc-drift, classify and prioritize findings
- fix: Convergence loop — classify, apply safe fixes, verify, re-detect (optional)
- audit: Invoke validate-context-engineering, find gaps, dedup against fixes
- fill: Convergence loop — fill gaps, regenerate AGENTS.md if needed, verify (optional)
- report: Synthesize verdict (PASS/WARN/FAIL) with per-category breakdown
  </objective>
